title: Republic Bureau of Xenology
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Republic Bureau of Xenology''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]-funded organization which studied and investigated new [[Species/Legends|species]]. Having very little information on [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Thon]]'s species, the [[Tchuukthai]], the Bureau gave the race the arbitrary name "Wharl."

{{Rep-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
*<!-- 2014-08-14 -->''[[Far Horizons]]''
